name: Process Dump via Sqldumper Detected
description: Detects the use of Sqldumper.exe, a utility included with Microsoft SQL Server, to create process dumps. Attackers may use this to dump the LSASS process and extract credentials. Legitimate SQL Server actions can cause false positives.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows event ID for process creation (e.g., Sysmon Event ID 1 or Security Event ID 4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was created, which should be 'sqldumper.exe'.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute sqldumper.exe, including memory dump arguments.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which sqldumper.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
